title: Timber Physics - Nether addon
description: Lets you chopp Nether Trees with Timber Physics
body:
# This pack adds Timber Physics!
If you chop a Nether Tree with an Axe, it will fall over!

### This is an addon for the Timber Physics Pack. You need to have that installed for this to work.

This is not in the main Project, because there are quite a few limitations with Nether Trees:
- i cant detect what wart blocks belong to what tree (for custom tree designs)
- i cant know what shroomlights or vines are part of the tree

Due to that, this pack only really works on vanilla Nether Trees!

### Here are some action screenshots:

![before chopp](https://i.imgur.com/Kn7GxYH.png)

![falling](https://i.imgur.com/8WGbUr3.png)

![fallen](https://i.imgur.com/YADHRj2.png)
